summary: Russian forces used FPV drones to kill a Ukrainian evacuation team near Huliaipole during a declared ceasefire, while another Russian FPV strike hit a civilian parking area in Kherson’s Korabelnyi district. Ukrainian operators destroyed a Russian UAZ Bukhanka with an FPV drone, killing at least two troops, and also used FPVs to strike Russian soldiers on motorcycles and one pretending to surrender. The Russian "Rubicon" Center reported intercepting over 2,000 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and destroying 110 targets in a single day, with drones comprising 36.4% of their 23,000+ recorded kills. Ukrainian forces countered with drone detectors and electronic warfare, while XDOWN unveiled a 300 km/h, 64 km-range FPV drone concept.
